name: Our FICA Tip Credit Recovery for Hospitality Businesses Process Explained — Salt Lake City
description: Learn about the complete FICA Tip Credit Recovery for Hospitality Businesses process at Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists in Salt Lake City. Reclaim Tax Credits helps businesses recover dollar-for-dollar

step.name: Step 1: Fica claim process
step.text: Fica claim process — Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists walks you through our FICA Tip Credit Recovery for Hospitality Businesses fica claim process in Salt Lake City. Reclaim Tax Credits helps businesses recover dollar-for-dollar tax credits on employee tip income. A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs' CPA/accountants learn how to gain FICA tax credits and refunds, specializing in leveraging federal FICA programs to capture overpaid taxes in the form of credits and refunds, maximizing FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years, and increasing profitability for hospitality businesses. Get exact numbers the IRS owes you at no upfront charge. We charge a small percentage of the refund/credits you receive.
